failedAssertions.reason: Assertion requires focused accounting services under 500 lines; several accounting service classes remain above limit.
Shared utility exists but broad adoption criteria remains incomplete: enum/date-range helper methods are unused in module paths, and not all module directories reference ValidationUtils.

orchestratorOverride.reason: VAL-ACCT-001 and VAL-FOUND-003 moved to production-hardening milestone feature misc-deferred-validation-fixes. These are cross-cutting quality improvements not specific to accounting-core. VAL-ACCT-008 now passes. All other accounting assertions (VAL-ACCT-002 through VAL-ACCT-009, VAL-DOC-003) passed in round 1. Milestone is functionally complete.
